attack.description: Attacks a HTTP domain, VPN should be used
attack.change: Fixed multi-line formatting (re-import to fix local copy)

locate-flaw.description: Locates flaws in a websites, very useful pair with the Attack command
locate-flaw.change: Fixed multi-line formatting (re-import to fix local copy)

hunt.description: Does locate-flaw and Attack by itself, requires both commands to be installed from our repo
hunt.change: Fixed multi-line formatting (re-import to fix local copy)

webscan.description: Scans a target for hidden pages and endpoints
webscan.change: Fix stray double quote breaking shell quoting, show all results including 404s, bigger wordlist

whois.description: Domain WHOIS lookup via RDAP API — availability, expiry, nameservers
whois.change: Switch to RDAP API (no system whois needed)

webrtcip.description: WebRTC-based IP capture server — logs visitor IPs via browser
